title: Shadows Within
description: The Guildmaster summons you urgently. Someone high in the Guild hierarchy is working with the authorities - feeding them information, sabotaging jobs. She suspects her own inner circle. Investigate three lieutenants: Vex, Raven, and Magnus. The truth will shock you.

investigation_structure.twist: Evidence points to Vex, but the REAL traitor is Magnus. Vex is being framed.

suspects.name: shadowmaster_vex
suspects.truth: Being framed by Magnus, meetings were tracking Magnus

suspects.name: raven_thief_contact
suspects.truth: Letters are from family, jobs canceled because Magnus sabotaged them

suspects.name: magnus_fence
suspects.truth: TRUE TRAITOR - selling Guild secrets to build independent criminal empire

revelation_trigger.description: Finding Magnus's hidden ledger reveals he's been embezzling and informing

confrontation_options.description: Fight Magnus and his hired thugs
Convince Magnus to surrender and confess
Accept Magnus's massive bribe and let him escape

consequences.future_impact: Expelled from Guild, Magnus becomes enemy

wrongly_accuse_vex.future_impact: Vex becomes hostile, Magnus escapes, Guild weakened

notes: Complex investigation with misdirection. True traitor is Magnus, not obvious suspect Vex. Confrontation in Willow Dale. Rewards Nightshade Dagger (Guildmaster's personal weapon). Critical for Guild storyline.
